about.title: About Foshan Jin Yu
about.subtitle: Professional advertising materials manufacturer integrating design, R&D, production and global sales since 2009.
about.whoWeAreText: Foshan Jin Yu Advertising Material Co., Ltd is a professional manufacturer of advertising materials established in 2009. We are located in the U+Zhigu Industrial Park, LiShui Town, Nanhai District, Foshan City, Guangdong Province �?one of China's most concentrated hubs for advertising material production.
about.whoWeAreText2: Our business integrates design, research and development, production and sales of advertising materials including self adhesive vinyl, PVC flex banner, PVC foam board, acrylic sheet, aluminum composite panel, PP hollow sheet, reflective sheeting, display stands and sign-making accessories.
about.whoWeAreText3: We export to Southeast Asia, Europe, the Americas, the Middle East and other global markets. Our products are known for durability, customizability, and competitive factory-direct pricing.

timeline.2022: First overseas cooperation at Canton Fair

about.factoryText: Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility is equipped with advanced production lines and quality control equipment. We maintain strict quality standards throughout the manufacturing process.
about.capacityText: With expanded production lines and equipment, we can meet large-volume orders with consistent quality and competitive pricing.
about.certificatesText: We are proud to hold ISO 9001:2015 certification, demonstrating our commitment to quality management and continuous improvement.

products.title: Advertising Material Products
products.subtitle: Comprehensive range of advertising substrates and display materials. Factory-direct pricing, custom specifications, global shipping.

faq.q1: What is your minimum order quantity?
faq.a1: Our MOQ varies by product. Please contact us for specific product inquiries.
faq.a2: Yes, we can provide samples for quality evaluation. Shipping costs apply.
faq.a3: We accept T/T, L/C, and Western Union. Specific terms depend on order volume.
faq.a4: Delivery time is typically 15-25 days after order confirmation, depending on quantity and specifications.

about.title: Tungkol sa Foshan Jin Yu
about.subtitle: Propesyonal na manufacturer ng mga materyales sa advertising na nagbibigkis ng design, R&D, production at global sales simula 2009.
about.whoWeAreText: Foshan Jin Yu Advertising Material Co., Ltd ay isang propesyonal na manufacturer ng mga materyales sa advertising na itinatag noong 2009. Matatagpuan kami sa U+Zhigu Industrial Park, LiShui Town, Nanhai District, Foshan City, Guangdong Province �?isa sa mga pinaka-concentrated na hub ng production ng advertising material sa China.
about.whoWeAreText2: Ang aming negosyo ay nagbibigkis ng design, research and development, production at sales ng mga materyales sa advertising kabilang ang self adhesive vinyl, PVC flex banner, PVC foam board, acrylic sheet, aluminum composite panel, PP hollow sheet, reflective sheeting, display stands at mga accessories sa paggawa ng sign.
about.whoWeAreText3: Nag-eexport kami sa Southeast Asia, Europe, Americas, Middle East at ibang global na merkado. Ang aming mga produkto ay kilala sa durability, customizability at competitive na factory-direct na presyo.

timeline.2022: Unang overseas cooperation sa Canton Fair
timeline.2023_07: Pinalawak ang production lines at equipment

about.factoryText: Ang aming state-of-the-art na manufacturing facility ay equipped ng advanced production lines at quality control equipment. Mahigpit naming pinapanatili ang mga quality standards sa buong manufacturing process.
about.capacityText: Sa pamamagitan ng pinalawak na production lines at equipment, maaari kaming makapag-meet ng large-volume orders na may consistent quality at competitive na presyo.
about.certificatesText: Ipinagmamalaki naming mayroon kaming ISO 9001:2015 certification, na nagpapakita ng aming commitment sa quality management at continuous improvement.

products.title: Mga Produkto sa Advertising Material
products.subtitle: Kumpletong hanay ng mga substrate sa advertising at display materials. Factory-direct na pricing, custom specifications, global shipping.

form.title: Magpadala ng Message
form.name: Ang Iyong Pangalan
form.success: Matagumpay na ipinadala ang message! Magre-reply kami sa lalong madaling panahon.

faq.q1: Ano ang inyong minimum order quantity?
faq.a1: Ang aming MOQ ay nagbabago ayon sa produkto. Makipag-ugnayan sa amin para sa partikular na product inquiries.
faq.a2: Oo, maaari kaming magbigay ng samples para sa quality evaluation. May mga shipping costs na applied.
faq.a3: Tumatanggap kami ng T/T, L/C, at Western Union. Ang partikular na terms ay depende sa order volume.
faq.a4: Ang delivery time ay karaniwang 15-25 days matapos ang order confirmation, depende sa quantity at specifications.
